ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trains" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train */,
  "train_name" TEXT /* Name of the train */,
  "train_number" TEXT /* Train number */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending station */,
  "train_type" INTEGER /* ID of the train type */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the train follows */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the train */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the train in km/h */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator responsible for the train */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_train_type FOREIGN KEY ("train_type") REFERENCES train_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Station code */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the station was opened */,
  "average_daily_passengers" INTEGER /* Average number of passengers per day */,
  "security_level" INTEGER /* Security level of the station (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending station */,
  "total_stops" INTEGER /* Total number of stops on the route */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "estimated_travel_time" TEXT /* Estimated travel time for the route */,
  "average_daily_trains" INTEGER /* Average number of trains per day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the route information was updated */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Current status of the route (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_times" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "arrives" TEXT /* Arrival time at the station */,
  "halt_time" TEXT /* Halt time at the station */,
  "departs" TEXT /* Departure time from the station */,
  "platform" INTEGER /* Platform number */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time (for real-time updates) */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time (for real-time updates) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stop time information was updated */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes delayed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_times_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_times_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the train type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the train type */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the train type in km/h */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Average capacity of the train type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the train type information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "platform_number" INTEGER /* Platform number */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the platform */,
  "platform_length" INTEGER /* Length of the platform in meters */,
  "platform_width" INTEGER /* Width of the platform in meters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the platform information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the train (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Canceled) */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time at the final destination */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated departure time from the starting station */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time (for real-time updates) */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time (for real-time updates) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the schedule information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_schedules_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes delayed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the delay information was updated */,
  "estimated_recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to recover from the delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delays_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES train_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date of the cancellation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the cancellation information was updated */,
  "estimated_recovery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date to resume service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES train_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "frequent_traveler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger is a frequent traveler */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the passenger */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the passenger information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was booked */,
  "source_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source station */,
  "destination_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination station */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the passenger */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the ticket information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_source_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_destination_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES train_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation was made */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., Confirmed, Waitlisted) */,
  "reservation_price" REAL /* Price of the reservation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the reservation information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the train */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Positive, Negative) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the feedback information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
